name: Design Twitter
description:
Design a simplified version of Twitter where users can post tweets, follow/unfollow another user, and get the 10 most recent tweets in their news feed. Implement the Twitter class:
- Twitter() Initializes the twitter object.
- postTweet(userId, tweetId) Composes a new tweet with ID tweetId by the user userId.
- getNewsFeed(userId) Retrieves the 10 most recent tweet IDs in the user's news feed (includes own tweets and tweets from followed users), ordered from most recent to least recent.
- follow(followerId, followeeId) The user with ID followerId follows the user with ID followeeId.
- unfollow(followerId, followeeId) The user with ID followerId unfollows the user with ID followeeId.
constraints: 1 <= userId, followerId, followeeId <= 500. 0 <= tweetId <= 10^4. At most 3 * 10^4 calls total.

performance.target_time: Amortized O(log n) updates, O((f + 10) log f) feed merge
accepted_time: Amortized O(log n) updates, O((f + 10) log f) feed merge
performance.stress_intent: exercise multi-user posting, following, and feed queries that punish rescanning all tweets for every request
